category_sources: source_facts.description says cinematic Git commit replay tool; official GitHub README describes animated Git history replay in the terminal.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name and official GitHub repository name both use gitlogue.
docs_sources: Official README contains quick start, configuration, key bindings, and links to the repository docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/unhappychoice/gitlogue, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitHub README describe terminal-based Git commit replay and visualization.
